## MessageChannelEndpoints class

Enhanced MessageChannel-based endpoint pair for testing This uses real MessageChannel/MessagePort objects but adds comprehensive testing utilities and better integration with remobj communication patterns.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class MessageChannelEndpoints implements EndpointPair 
```
**Implements:** [EndpointPair](./testing.endpointpair.md)
